本頁整合 Aliskiren 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of essential hypertension.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L1</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>hypertensive disorder（100.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension owing to lung disease and/or hypoxia（100.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension with unclear multifactorial mechanism（100.0%）</li>
<li>malignant hypertensive renal disease（100.0%）</li>
<li>malignant renovascular hypertension（100.0%）</li>
<li>Braddock syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>chronic pulmonary heart disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>cerebrovascular disorder（99.2%）</li>
<li>obsolete susceptibility to ischemic stroke（98.8%）</li>
<li>brain stem infarction（98.0%）</li>
<li>intracerebral hemorrhage（96.7%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（96.6%）</li>
<li>cerebral artery occlusion（96.2%）</li>
<li>MRI defined brain infarct（95.7%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（95.5%）</li>
<li>ABri amyloidosis（94.8%）</li>
<li>cerebral infarction（94.3%）</li>
<li>alopecia（93.4%）</li>
<li>diffuse alopecia areata（92.8%）</li>
<li>cerebral arterial disease（90.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
